prompt: Studia questa directory. Dimmi come potrei migliorare la flint CLI — cosa manca, cosa ha troppo?
content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: improve_flint_cli_surface
C: python_cli_flint_ir ∧ bash_wrapper_flint ∧ bash_wrapper_flint_mcp ∧ "flint name collides across two binaries"
P: missing_stdin_dash_path ∧ missing_repair_in_place_flag ∧ missing_encode_decode_verbs ∧ missing_structural_diff_between_two_docs ∧ missing_shell_completion ∧ audit_explain_overloaded_with_five_concerns ∧ claude_code_subgroup_is_integration_specific_bloat_in_generic_cli ∧ routing_only_has_recommend_no_list_or_validate ∧ audit_lacks_json_output ∧ inventory_lacks_json_output ∧ resolve_file_duplicated_across_flint_and_flint_mcp ∧ wrapper_exposes_no_own_help_or_version ∧ env_var_names_proliferate_three_per_wrapper
V: parse_errors_still_exit_one ∧ validate_stays_structural_only ∧ prose_audit_output_byte_stable ∧ existing_stats_json_schema_unchanged
A: add_stdin_dash_path_on_all_subcommands ∧ add("repair --write") ∧ add("audit --json") ∧ add("inventory --json") ∧ split_audit_explain_into_subcommand("inspect") ∧ add_subcommand("diff a.flint b.flint") ∧ add_shell_completion_via_argcomplete ∧ add("routing list") ∧ add("routing validate") ∧ move_claude_code_group_to_plugin_or_separate_entry_point ∧ collapse_flint_and_flint_mcp_into_one_wrapper_with_flag("--mcp") ∧ extract_shared_resolve_file_helper ∧ rename_bash_wrapper_to_disambiguate_from_python_cli
